retrieved_result: What does âLIMITEDâ mean? What does “LIMITED” mean? Posted on July 16, 2008. Filed under: Definitions | Tags: LIMITED |A limited movie means it has had a limited theater run, generally showing in fewer than 250 theaters. Generally smaller films (such as art house films) are released as limited. The same goes for music. Adver
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses the meaning of the word 'LIMITED' and limited theatrical releases; it has no relation to TikTok trends or 2024 trends.
